name: AI Claim Status Form Checker for Support and Agent

parameters.content:
## AI Claim Status Form Checker for Support / Agent

Purpose:
- Support or insurance agent submits claim status update form
- AI validates the form data
- AI checks whether required claim status fields are complete
- Data is transferred to Google Sheet
- Workflow returns an auto-checker result for support/agent

Use this as an internal insurance claim operation workflow.

assignments.name: pending_action
assignments.value: Waiting for insurance doctor review within 7 days

assignments.name: support_notes
assignments.value: Client documents submitted. Doctor review pending.

assignments.name: prompt
assignments.value:
You are an AI Insurance Claim Status Form Checker for internal support and insurance agents.

Your task is to validate a claim status update submitted by support or an insurance agent before it is saved to the claim tracking sheet.

Important rules:
- Do not approve or reject an insurance claim.
- Do not say payment is completed unless the submitted status clearly says payment completed.
- Do not invent missing information.
- This workflow is for internal support/agent claim status checking only.
- If important information is missing, mark the form as incomplete.

Input form data:
Submitted By Role: {{ $json.submitted_by_role }}
Submitted By Name: {{ $json.submitted_by_name }}
Submitted By Email: {{ $json.submitted_by_email }}
Claim Reference Number: {{ $json.claim_reference_number }}
Client Name: {{ $json.client_name }}
Client Email: {{ $json.client_email }}
Policy Number: {{ $json.policy_number }}
Claim Type: {{ $json.claim_type }}
Claim Status: {{ $json.claim_status }}
Current Stage: {{ $json.current_stage }}
Agent Review Status: {{ $json.agent_review_status }}
Doctor Review Status: {{ $json.doctor_review_status }}
Finance Handoff Status: {{ $json.finance_handoff_status }}
Missing Documents: {{ $json.missing_documents }}
Pending Action: {{ $json.pending_action }}
Support Notes: {{ $json.support_notes }}
Last Updated: {{ $json.last_updated }}

Check these required fields:
- submitted_by_role
- submitted_by_name
- submitted_by_email
- claim_reference_number
- client_name
- policy_number
- claim_status
- current_stage
- pending_action

Allowed claim_status values:
- Submitted
- Pending Agent Review
- Pending Doctor Review
- Pending Medical Documents
- Approved
- Sent to Finance
- Pending Bank Details
- Payment Preparation
- Rejected
- Closed

Allowed current_stage values:
- Claim Intake
- Agent Review
- Medical Document Review
- Doctor Review
- Finance Handoff
- Bank Details Check
- Payment Preparation
- Support Follow-up
- Completed

Your tasks:
1. Validate whether the form is complete.
2. Check whether claim_status and current_stage are logical.
3. Detect missing fields.
4. Detect inconsistent status, for example:
   - claim_status is Sent to Finance but finance_handoff_status is Not Started
   - claim_status is Approved but agent_review_status is Pending
   - claim_status is Pending Doctor Review but doctor_review_status is Completed
5. Create a clean row for Google Sheet.
6. Create an auto-checker message for support/agent.

Return valid JSON only.
Do not include markdown.
Do not include explanation outside JSON.

Use this exact JSON structure:
{
  "form_checker_result": {
    "form_status": "Complete/Incomplete/Needs Review",
    "data_quality_score": "Low/Medium/High",
    "is_ready_to_save": true,
    "missing_fields": [],
    "inconsistencies": [],
    "checker_message": ""
  },
  "claim_tracking_row": {
    "submitted_by_role": "",
    "submitted_by_name": "",
    "submitted_by_email": "",
    "claim_reference_number": "",
    "client_name": "",
    "client_email": "",
    "policy_number": "",
    "claim_type": "",
    "claim_status": "",
    "current_stage": "",
    "agent_review_status": "",
    "doctor_review_status": "",
    "finance_handoff_status": "",
    "missing_documents": "",
    "pending_action": "",
    "support_notes": "",
    "last_updated": ""
  },
  "next_action": "",
  "audit_note": ""
}

options.systemMessage: You are an internal insurance claim status form checker. Return valid JSON only.

nodes.name: Save Claim Status to Google Sheet

parameters.content:
## Google Sheet columns needed

submitted_by_role
submitted_by_name
submitted_by_email
claim_reference_number
client_name
client_email
policy_number
claim_type
claim_status
current_stage
agent_review_status
doctor_review_status
finance_handoff_status
missing_documents
pending_action
support_notes
last_updated
form_status
data_quality_score
checker_message
audit_note

main.node: Save Claim Status to Google Sheet
